# shelly_eth_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `dhcp_end` (String) DHCP range ending IP address for the DHCP server in server mode. Applicable only for server mode. Required if not already set
- `dhcp_start` (String) DHCP range starting IP address for the DHCP server in server mode. Applicable only for server mode. Required if not already set
- `enable` (Boolean) true if the connection is enabled, false otherwise
- `gw` (String) Gateway of the network for client mode static and for server mode enabled. Optional, set to null to clear
- `ipv4mode` (String) IPv4 mode. Range of values: dhcp, static. Applicable only for client mode. Can be omitted if once set
- `nameserver` (String) Nameserver to use for client mode static and for server mode enabled. Optional, set to null to clear
- `netmask` (String) Netmask of the network for client mode static and for server mode enabled. Optional, defaults to 255.255.255.0
- `server_mode` (Boolean) true if the inerface is configured to operate in server mode, false if in client mode
